title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.306 - Cash surrender value, life insurer may lend to policyholder, when
text:
376.306.  Cash surrender value, life insurer may lend to policyholder, when. — A life insurer may lend to a policyholder on the security of the cash surrender value of the policyholder's policy a sum not to exceed the legal reserve that the insurer is required to maintain on the policy.
(L. 2007 S.B. 66)
